summary: Verify authenticated user can view account balance on dashboard
description: Validates that a logged-in user can successfully see their account balance displayed on the dashboard
action: Navigate to login page|Enter valid username and password|Click Sign In button|Wait for dashboard to load|Verify account balance is displayed on dashboard
expected_results: User is authenticated successfully and account balance is visible on the dashboard showing the correct amount

steps.action: Verify account balance is displayed on dashboard
steps.expected: User is authenticated successfully and account balance is visible on the dashboard showing the correct amount

summary: Verify unauthenticated user is redirected to login page
description: Validates that users without valid authentication are redirected to the login page when attempting to access the dashboard
action: Clear all browser cookies and session data|Attempt to directly navigate to dashboard URL|Observe page behavior|Verify redirect occurs
expected_results: User is automatically redirected to the login page and cannot view the dashboard or account balance

steps.action: Clear all browser cookies and session data
Attempt to directly navigate to dashboard URL

steps.expected: User is automatically redirected to the login page and cannot view the dashboard or account balance

summary: Verify balance displays in USD format with 2 decimal places
description: Validates that the account balance is formatted correctly with USD currency symbol and exactly 2 decimal places
action: Login with valid credentials|Navigate to dashboard|Locate account balance display|Verify currency symbol is present|Verify decimal places count
expected_results: Balance is displayed with $ symbol prefix and exactly 2 decimal places (e.g., $1,500.50)

steps.expected: Balance is displayed with $ symbol prefix and exactly 2 decimal places (e.g., $1,500.50)

description: Validates that an account with zero balance shows $0.00 instead of blank or null
action: Login with credentials for zero balance account|Navigate to dashboard|Locate account balance display|Verify balance shows $0.00
expected_results: Zero balance is displayed as $0.00 and not as blank, null, empty, or $0

steps.action: Login with credentials for zero balance account

steps.expected: Zero balance is displayed as $0.00 and not as blank, null, empty, or $0

description: Validates that the account balance updates automatically every 30 seconds without user interaction
action: Login with valid credentials|Navigate to dashboard|Note initial balance and timestamp|Wait 30 seconds without any interaction|Verify balance data is refreshed|Monitor network calls for API request
test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Updated Balance: $1,050.00|Refresh Interval: 30 seconds
expected_results: Balance automatically refreshes every 30 seconds and reflects the latest data from the server

steps.test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Updated Balance: $1,050.00|Refresh Interval: 30 seconds

steps.action: Monitor network calls for API request
steps.expected: Balance automatically refreshes every 30 seconds and reflects the latest data from the server

summary: Verify API response time is under 2 seconds
description: Validates that the GET /api/accounts/{id}/balance endpoint returns response within the required 2-second threshold
action: Login with valid credentials|Open browser developer tools network tab|Navigate to dashboard|Locate the balance API call|Record response time|Verify response time is under 2000ms
test_data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|Authorization: Bearer valid_token|Maximum Response Time: 2000ms
expected_results: API response is received in less than 2 seconds and balance is displayed promptly

steps.test_data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|Authorization: Bearer valid_token|Maximum Response Time: 2000ms

steps.action: Open browser developer tools network tab

steps.expected: API response is received in less than 2 seconds and balance is displayed promptly

summary: Verify API requires valid Bearer token in Authorization header
description: Validates that the balance API endpoint rejects requests without a valid Bearer token
action: Send GET request to /api/accounts/{id}/balance without Authorization header|Verify 401 response|Send request with invalid token|Verify 401 response|Send request with expired token|Verify 401 response
test_data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|No Token: null|Invalid Token: Bearer invalid_token_123|Expired Token: Bearer expired_token_456
expected_results: API returns 401 Unauthorized status code for all requests without valid Bearer token

steps.action: Send GET request to /api/accounts/{id}/balance without Authorization header
steps.test_data: API Endpoint: GET /api/accounts/12345/balance|No Token: null|Invalid Token: Bearer invalid_token_123|Expired Token: Bearer expired_token_456

steps.expected: API returns 401 Unauthorized status code for all requests without valid Bearer token

summary: Verify balance display with large amount
description: Validates that very large account balances are displayed correctly with proper formatting including thousand separators
action: Login with credentials for high-balance account|Navigate to dashboard|Verify large balance displays correctly|Check for thousand separators|Verify 2 decimal places maintained
expected_results: Large balance is displayed with proper thousand separators and 2 decimal places as $1,234,567.89

steps.action: Login with credentials for high-balance account

steps.expected: Large balance is displayed with proper thousand separators and 2 decimal places as $1,234,567.89

summary: Verify balance display with negative amount (overdraft)
description: Validates that negative account balances (overdraft) are displayed correctly with negative indicator
action: Login with credentials for overdraft account|Navigate to dashboard|Verify negative balance displays correctly|Check for negative symbol or indicator|Verify formatting is consistent
test_data: Username: overdraft@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Account Balance: -150.25|Expected Display: -$150.25 or ($150.25)
expected_results: Negative balance is clearly displayed with negative indicator and maintains proper USD format with 2 decimal places

steps.action: Login with credentials for overdraft account
steps.test_data: Username: overdraft@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Account Balance: -150.25|Expected Display: -$150.25 or ($150.25)

steps.action: Check for negative symbol or indicator

steps.expected: Negative balance is clearly displayed with negative indicator and maintains proper USD format with 2 decimal places

summary: Verify user cannot access another user's balance
description: Validates that authenticated users cannot view account balances belonging to other users
action: Login with User A credentials|Note User A's account ID|Attempt to call API with User B's account ID|Verify access is denied|Check dashboard only shows own balance
test_data: User A: testuser@bank.com|User A Account ID: 12345|User B Account ID: 67890|Authorization: Bearer user_a_token
expected_results: API returns 403 Forbidden when attempting to access another user's balance data

steps.test_data: User A: testuser@bank.com|User A Account ID: 12345|User B Account ID: 67890|Authorization: Bearer user_a_token

steps.action: Attempt to call API with User B's account ID
Check dashboard only shows own balance
steps.expected: API returns 403 Forbidden when attempting to access another user's balance data

summary: Verify balance display handles API timeout gracefully
description: Validates that the application handles API timeout scenarios gracefully with appropriate error messaging
action: Login with valid credentials|Simulate network delay exceeding 2 seconds|Navigate to dashboard|Observe balance display behavior|Verify error handling and user feedback
test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Simulated Delay: 5000ms|Expected: Error message or retry mechanism
expected_results: Application displays appropriate error message or loading indicator when API timeout occurs and does not crash

steps.test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Simulated Delay: 5000ms|Expected: Error message or retry mechanism

steps.action: Verify error handling and user feedback
steps.expected: Application displays appropriate error message or loading indicator when API timeout occurs and does not crash

summary: Verify session expiry redirects to login
description: Validates that when user session expires during dashboard viewing the user is redirected to login page
action: Login with valid credentials|Navigate to dashboard|Verify balance is displayed|Wait for session to expire or invalidate session token|Wait for next 30-second refresh|Verify redirect to login page
test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Session Timeout: Simulated expiry|Expected Redirect: /login
expected_results: User is redirected to login page when session expires and balance is no longer accessible

steps.test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Session Timeout: Simulated expiry|Expected Redirect: /login

steps.action: Wait for session to expire or invalidate session token

steps.expected: User is redirected to login page when session expires and balance is no longer accessible

summary: Verify balance display with cents-only amount
description: Validates that amounts less than one dollar display correctly
action: Login with credentials for low-balance account|Navigate to dashboard|Verify balance under $1 displays correctly|Check decimal formatting
expected_results: Balance of less than one dollar displays correctly as $0.75 with proper formatting

steps.action: Login with credentials for low-balance account

steps.expected: Balance of less than one dollar displays correctly as $0.75 with proper formatting

summary: Verify balance API handles invalid account ID
description: Validates that the API returns appropriate error for non-existent or invalid account IDs
action: Login with valid credentials|Send GET request with non-existent account ID|Verify error response|Send GET request with malformed account ID|Verify error handling
test_data: Valid Token: Bearer valid_token|Non-existent ID: 99999999|Malformed ID: abc!@#|SQL Injection attempt: 1 OR 1=1
expected_results: API returns 404 Not Found for non-existent accounts and 400 Bad Request for malformed IDs without exposing system information

steps.test_data: Valid Token: Bearer valid_token|Non-existent ID: 99999999|Malformed ID: abc!@#|SQL Injection attempt: 1 OR 1=1

steps.action: Send GET request with non-existent account ID
Send GET request with malformed account ID

steps.expected: API returns 404 Not Found for non-existent accounts and 400 Bad Request for malformed IDs without exposing system information

summary: Verify real-time balance reflects recent transactions
description: Validates that the balance displayed reflects recent transactions accurately during the 30-second refresh cycle
action: Login with valid credentials|Note initial balance on dashboard|Perform a transaction in another session or via API|Wait for 30-second auto-refresh|Verify balance reflects the transaction
test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Transaction: -$50.00 withdrawal|Expected New Balance: $950.00
expected_results: After 30-second refresh the balance accurately reflects the recent transaction showing updated amount

steps.test_data: Username: testuser@bank.com|Password: ValidPass123!|Initial Balance: $1,000.00|Transaction: -$50.00 withdrawal|Expected New Balance: $950.00

steps.action: Perform a transaction in another session or via API

steps.expected: After 30-second refresh the balance accurately reflects the recent transaction showing updated amount
